origin.name: Sri Lanka
origin.investigating_authority: Sri Lanka Police and government medical officer
origin.death_certificate_name: Death certificate from Registrar General's Department
origin.key_document: Death certificate (with certified English translation) and embalming certificate
origin.source: FCDO Sri Lanka travel advice, updated 2025; British High Commission Colombo guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom

airlines.name: British Airways
airlines.routes: CMB to LHR (via SIN or DXB)

special_rules: Death certificate is in Sinhala. Certified English translation required for UK purposes.
Police must be notified for unexpected deaths before any process can begin.
British High Commission in Colombo handles all consular matters.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Sri Lankan documentation must be in certified English. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British High Commission in Colombo can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Sri Lanka to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Sri Lanka. Repatriation to the UK takes 14-28 days. Colombo cargo flights and all documentation handled. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland
key_documents: Death certificate with certified English translation
special_rules: Irish consular matters for Sri Lanka are handled via the Irish Embassy in New Delhi, India.
Certified English translation of death certificate required identically to UK repatriations.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation in certified English. The Coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. Irish consular matters for Sri Lanka handled via the Irish Embassy in New Delhi.
destinations.seo_title: Sri Lanka to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Sri Lanka and needs to come home to Ireland. 14-28 days. Colombo cargo and all documentation handled. Contact us 24/7.
